channel.title: NUZU News
channel.description: NUZU: Real News in Real Time. Breaking headlines from 200+ trusted sources.

DW News. . Pakistan hosting direct US–Iran talks in Islamabad recently instantly turned into meme fuel — with Pakistan cast as the “hero” and India sidelined. Indian social-media accounts fired back, mocking the talks as a flop and branding Pakistan a US pup - facebook.com
